forecast-period.text: Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm. Heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding possible near the Barossa Valley in the morning. Damaging winds possible. Winds westerly 35 to 50 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 13 and 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 16.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm about the southern Fleurieu Peninsula in the morning. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h turning southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 15.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning westerly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 16.
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm this morning. Damaging winds possible. Winds westerly 35 to 55 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the south in the evening. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h turning southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning westerly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm this morning. Damaging winds possible. Winds westerly 30 to 45 km/h increasing to 35 to 55 km/h in the middle of the day then tending southwesterly 35 to 50 km/h in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures between 15 and 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the evening. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning westerly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm this morning. Damaging winds possible near the coast. Winds north to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h turning westerly 30 to 45 km/h during the morning. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h in the late afternoon then becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm near the coast in the morning. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h turning southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers near the coast, medium chance elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending westerly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm this morning. Damaging winds possible near the coast. Winds north to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h turning westerly during the day. Daytime maximum temperatures around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm near the coast in the morning. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h turning southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers near the coast, medium chance elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, becoming less likely late this afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm during the morning and afternoon. Winds northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h tending westerly 25 to 40 km/h in the middle of the day then decreasing to 20 to 25 km/h in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 20.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely from the late morning. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm near the eastern border in the morning. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h tending southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm. Heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding possible in the west in the morning. Damaging winds possible in the west. Winds northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h turning westerly 25 to 40 km/h in the late morning. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely from the late morning. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the southwest, medium chance elsewhere. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h tending southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding possible in the south in the morning. Damaging winds possible. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h turning westerly 30 to 45 km/h during the morning. Daytime maximum temperatures between 14 and 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 16.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h turning southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 15.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h tending southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 16.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, becoming less likely late this afternoon and evening. Damaging winds possible. Winds northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h turning westerly 35 to 50 km/h during the morning. Daytime maximum temperatures between 14 and 19.
Sun protection 11:30am to 12:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely from the late morning. Winds westerly 35 to 50 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 18.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h turning southwesterly during the morning then decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 17.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Hawker, most likely in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 16.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers east of Ceduna, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm south of Streaky Bay early this morning. Damaging winds possible. Winds westerly 30 to 45 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection 11:30am to 1:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers east of Ceduna, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm south of Streaky Bay in the evening. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h turning southwesterly during the morning then decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h tending southwesterly during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, becoming less likely in the late morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the south early this morning. Winds northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h turning westerly 35 to 50 km/h early in the morning. Daytime maximum temperatures between 17 and 20.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h turning southwesterly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers near the coast, slight chance elsewhere. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h tending southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, becoming less likely this morning. The chance of a thunderstorm early this morning. Damaging winds possible. Winds westerly 35 to 50 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the evening. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Mostly sunny. Medium chance of showers south of Woomera, becoming less likely this afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Damaging winds possible south of Woomera. Winds westerly 35 to 55 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 20.
Sun protection 10:40am to 2:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. Medium chance of showers south of Woomera, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 22.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Woomera, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h turning southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the far west. Light winds becoming southeast to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Mostly sunny. High chance of showers south of Yunta, becoming less likely late this afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm south of Yunta early this morning. Damaging winds possible about the Gammon Ranges. Winds westerly 30 to 45 km/h increasing to 35 to 55 km/h in the morning. Daytime maximum temperatures between 19 and 25.
Sun protection 10:40am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. High chance of showers south of Yunta, most likely from the late morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 23.

Mostly sunny. Medium chance of showers south of Yunta, most likely in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h turning southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 22.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta in the morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 20.
